interactions.stageContent: {"selectionRationale":"Refined the deck structure based on feedback. Added a dedicated Google Workspace Integration slide and sharpened section titles for Meridian Dynamics.","personalizationNotes":"Updated slide titles to be more specific to Meridian's digital transformation consulting context. Added Google Workspace slide per refinement feedback.","sections":[{"sectionName":"About AtlusDeck","purpose":"Establish credibility with company background, customer logos, and market positioning","selectedSlideId":"slide-001","rationale":"Refined title emphasizes brand identity; builds trust with enterprise consulting buyers"},{"sectionName":"Meridian's Growth Challenge","purpose":"Personalized framing of their 5-7 day proposal bottleneck and pipeline constraints","selectedSlideId":"slide-002","rationale":"More personalized title directly references Meridian; strengthens problem resonance"},{"sectionName":"AI-Powered Proposal Automation","purpose":"Technical overview of the content assembly engine with HITL quality gates","selectedSlideId":"slide-003","rationale":"Clearer technical framing appeals to Meridian's tech-savvy decision makers"},{"sectionName":"Platform Capabilities","purpose":"Deep dive into template management, slide library, and deck structure intelligence","selectedSlideId":"slide-004","rationale":"Expanded scope now covers slide library and structure intelligence features"},{"sectionName":"Google Workspace Integration","purpose":"Show native Slides/Docs/Drive integration with automatic folder organization","selectedSlideId":"slide-005","rationale":"New slide added per refinement — Meridian uses Google Workspace extensively"},{"sectionName":"Proven Results","purpose":"Quantified ROI: 95% faster turnaround, 20% engagement lift, 4x capacity scaling","selectedSlideId":"slide-006","rationale":"Concrete metrics that support Meridian's internal business case"},{"sectionName":"Pilot Program & Timeline","purpose":"Concrete rollout plan aligned with Meridian's Q2 deadline and budget approval","selectedSlideId":"slide-007","rationale":"Ties implementation directly to their stated Q2 budget approval window"},{"sectionName":"Let's Get Started","purpose":"Clear CTA with demo scheduling and pilot kickoff next steps","selectedSlideId":"slide-008","rationale":"Strong closing with actionable next steps to maintain deal velocity"}]}
